repo_root_resolution.notes: Hermes currently runs from WSL but must remain aware of the Windows-hosted vault path.

binding_discovery.notes: Hermes may need both WSL-local and Windows-visible binding awareness, but should fail closed if bindings diverge.

fail_closed_rules: If WSL and Windows binding surfaces disagree, escalate rather than infer.
If personal user binding is absent, remain in core-only or runtime-only mode.
If runtime identity sources are missing, do not assume Hermes authority expansion.
notes: Example bootstrap contract only. Reflects bounded Hermes lane posture, not new authority.
